parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3.1:8b", stream: false, options: { temperature: 0, num_predict: 200 }, prompt: "No thinking, no preamble, no markdown, no repeating the labels, no extra lines. You are scoring an incoming sales lead for a small automation consultancy. Output EXACTLY these 4 lines and nothing else:

INTENT: <one short phrase, under 8 words>
URGENCY: <one word: low, medium, high>
SCORE: <a single whole number from 1 to 10 rating how qualified and ready-to-buy this lead is>
SUMMARY: <one sentence, under 30 words>

Lead details:
Name: " + (($json.lead && $json.lead.name) || "") + "
Company: " + (($json.lead && $json.lead.company) || "unknown") + "
Source: " + (($json.lead && $json.lead.source) || "unknown") + "
Message: " + ((($json.lead && $json.lead.message) || "").slice(0, 1500)) }) }}
